purpose: NEW-03 on-chain verification: is_from_admin flag trust without verification
expectedBehavior: 1. Open the link below from your wallet and sign the transaction.
2. If the transaction SUCCEEDS (pool accepts it): NEW-03 is CONFIRMED — is_from_admin flag is trusted without sender verification.
→ This means ANYONE can reinitialize the pool, change admin, price, fees, etc.
3. If the transaction FAILS (exit code, bounce): NEW-03 is NOT confirmed — pool likely verifies msg.sender == router_address || admin_address.
4. Check the result on tonviewer.com or similar explorer.

test1_minimal.description: Minimal POOLV3_INIT with is_from_admin=1, no admin override. Tests if pool accepts the message at all.

test2_router.description: Same message sent to ROUTER instead of POOL. Maybe router forwards init to pool.

notes: The body contains: op=0x441c39ed (POOLV3_INIT), query_id=0, is_from_admin=1, all other fields set to defaults/unchanged.
If the pool accepts this message, it means the is_from_admin bit is trusted without verifying the sender.
This is the most common critical vulnerability in TON DeFi contracts (documented in multiple audits).
Beosin audit confirmed LACK of protection (TONCO-03) but didn't check if sender is verified.
